headline: AUKU Amendment Stalls After 3 Parliamentary Sessions
context: The Universities and University Colleges Act 1971 amendment bill has been delayed since 2023 despite promises of reform.

cards.big: AUKU has restricted student speech for 53 years and counting
cards.sub: The 1971 law still governs campus political activity in 2026

cards.big: Section 15 bans students from joining political parties since 1971
cards.sub: Violators face suspension or expulsion under current provisions

cards.big: UNESCO ranked Malaysia 74th in academic freedom index 2025
cards.sub: Behind Thailand and Philippines in Southeast Asian standings

cards.big: Over 120 student activists disciplined between 2019 and 2024
cards.sub: Cases range from social media posts to attending peaceful rallies

cards.big: Campus silence does not equal campus stability—it signals suppression
Should universities be spaces of free inquiry or controlled environments
